name: Standalone emotion recognition system
description: Like FER library: detects emotions from video, NOT open source, high risk. Art.5 non_compliant (emotion recognition). Art.50(3) must trigger for missing emotion disclosure.

_scope.is_ai_system_reasoning: ML-based emotion detection from video feeds
_scope.user_role_reasoning: Develops and sells the emotion recognition system

art6.reasoning: Emotion recognition system under Annex III

art5.legal_basis: Art. 5(1)(f): prohibited emotion recognition detected in workplace/education/law enforcement context — real-time emotion classification from video triggers Art. 5 prohibition

art6.legal_basis: Art. 6(2): emotion recognition system falls under Annex III high-risk category — is_high_risk=true confirmed, requires conformity assessment obligations

art9.legal_basis: Art. 9(1)-(9): high-risk AI system requires risk management system; has_risk_docs=false, has_risk_code_patterns=false — no risk management evidence found

art10.legal_basis: Art. 10(1)-(6): high-risk AI system requires data governance; has_data_governance_doc=false, has_bias_mitigation=false, has_data_lineage=false — no data governance evidence

art11.legal_basis: Art. 11(1): high-risk AI system requires technical documentation per Annex IV; has_technical_docs=false — no documentation found

art12.legal_basis: Art. 12(1)-(4): high-risk AI system requires automatic recording of events; has_logging=false — no logging infrastructure found

art13.legal_basis: Art. 13(1)-(3): high-risk AI system requires transparency and instructions for use; has_explainability=false, has_transparency_info=false — no transparency evidence

art14.legal_basis: Art. 14(1)-(5): high-risk AI system requires human oversight measures; has_human_oversight=false, has_override_mechanism=false — no oversight evidence

art15.legal_basis: Art. 15(1)-(5): high-risk AI system requires accuracy, robustness, cybersecurity; has_accuracy_testing=false, has_robustness_testing=false — no testing evidence

art50.legal_basis: Art. 50(3): emotion recognition system must disclose operation to exposed persons; is_emotion_recognition_system=true but has_emotion_biometric_disclosure=false
